Please Login message: Please log in using your WA Content Services (WACS) account.
Change Language message: Change the language that the app is displayed in. This will NOT affect your transcriptions.
Select how the app is displayed for you.
Modify how your transcriptions are proce: Modify how your transcriptions are processed.
Use Lined Paper message: Use lined paper using a verse-by-verse format, written on one side only.
Ensure Text Is Staight message: Ensure text is straight, with consistent margins on all sides.
Avoid Crossing Out message: Avoid crossing out mistakes. You can fix these once the document is done being transcribed.
Write In Block message: Write in block letters with even spacing between letters and words.
Do not use superscripts or subscripts.
Always Check message: Always check your results for missing content or incorrect words.
Upload Image text part 3: instead. This app supports most image formats, such as: PNG, JPG, PDF.
Retry transcription part 2: your transcription if there is a problem.
Please Be Patient message: Please be patient as this may take several minutes, depending on internet connection.
